properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: We are a chosen generation, We've been called forth to show His excellence, All I require for life, God has given me, And I know who I am. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know who God says I am, what He says I am Where He says I'm at, I know who I am, I know who God says I am, what He says I am Where He says I'm at, I know who I am, I'm working in power, I'm working miracles, I live a life of favour, for I know who I am, I'm working in power, I'm working miracles, I live a life of favour, for I know who I am.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am, Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am, Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am, Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am holy, and I am righteous oh-ooh… I am so rich, and I am beautiful! …

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm working in power, I'm working miracles I live a life of favour, for I know who I am I'm working in power, I'm working miracles I live a life of favour, for I know who I am Take a look at me, I’m a wonder It doesn't matter what you see now Can you see His glory? For I know who I am Take a look at me, I’m a wonder It doesn't matter what you see now Can you see His glory? For I know who I am

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am How many of you know who you are? Come on, come on Let the world know who you are.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am, Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh, oh-ooh-oooh I know who I am in your workplace. Going out and coming in (Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh) Declare it (Oh-ooh-oooh) Say I know (I know who I am) Every day I (Oh-ooh-oooh, oh-ooh) Going out and coming in (Oh-ooh-oooh) Say… (I know who I am!) I know!
